title: Google 知衰？用家可隱藏Pixel 3 XL 瀏海遮醜

replies.msg:
Google 新一代親生仔 Pixel 3 XL 在過去幾日正式發表，果然與傳聞中的一樣有著面積冠絕 Android 手機的超大「瀏海」，不單止用家不太收貨，就連 Samsung 等大廠都出言抽水、指 Pixel 3 XL 的「瀏海」可以用於飛機升降。

鑑於市場上的確有不少用戶並非「M字額」的擁躉，Google 方面很快就公開了一個「解決辦法」： 透過在屏幕頂部顯示一黑色的色塊令「瀏海」沒那麼顯眼。




▲ 這個方法是 Google 的官方帳號在回應一名用家的提問時透露的



▲ ▲ 事實上，在 Android 9.0 Pie 版本的開發者模式中，早就加入了這樣的功能，用戶可以按喜好隱藏「M字額」

可以讓用戶自己選擇當然是好事，然而，考慮到 Pixel 3 XL 的瀏海面積機頂的黑色位置似乎頗多，你又願意犧牲如此多的屏幕空間來「遮醜」嗎？
http://m.ringhk.com/editor/news2018/20181013_google_pixel3xlnotch_01.jpg
http://m.ringhk.com/news2a.php?id=17611

replies.msg:
google自己都有做野， 有減低烙印問題
另外， 都有自家tune oled display

The Google Pixel 3 addresses our biggest complaint with the Pixel 2: its display

https://www.google.com.hk/amp/s/www.androidcentral.com/google-pixel-3-addresses-pixel-2-display-woes%3famp

Google says it has reduced the burn-in potential by half compared to last year. It has also applied additional mitigations in the software to address particular problem areas like the navigation bar and ambient display — for example Google's own apps use an equal mix of white and black nav bars.

Google took these better displays and went to work calibrating them: there was a huge focus on starting with precise display accuracy at the start, and further calibration was then applied in software to make them perform as well as possible in a wide range of situations. Google says that the displays, when set to "Natural" mode (in the display settings), are 100% RGB compliant and "visually indistinguishable from perfect"
